title: Unique 83494 Pink Happy 40th Birthday Foil Banner-9' Silver | 1 Pc, Age 40
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 pink and silver "Happy 40th Birthday" foil banner - 9'.
PERFECT FOR BIRTHDAY PARTY: Perfect addition to your birthday decoration spicing up your venue.
GOOD QUALITY: A lightweight printed plastic banner which is easy to set up.
BPA-FREE: These are BPA-free and totally safe to use.
